title: Custom Rising blocks
description: a customizable lava rising mod for you to play with friends
body:
### Commands
/rising (commands)\
BlockType: changes the rising block (works with modded blocks).\
FillType: Normal makes the rising block only replace air, replace will just replace all blocks with the rising block.\
RiseSpeed: changes how fast the rising block rises.\
Size changes: how large the rising area is.\
Worldborder: Changes the world borders and rising areas center and size\
Info: just tells you some stuff\

This mod comes with 1 new liqud type "rising:void_water_block" i might add more in soon.\
This mod requires commands to activate and is expected to be used on servers.
